title: Phase 4 Predictive Strategic Twin Simulation
description: Demonstrates bounded predictive simulation using debt, verification, falsification history without claiming certainty or granting authority

case_context.unresolved_contradiction: Commitment made without execution owner identified

consequence_verification_scheduled.expectedOutcome: Q3 roadmap will slip OR execution owner assigned within 2 weeks

falsification_history.originalWarning: Vendor selection will be blocked by procurement policy
falsification_history.learningPoint: Similar escalation path may have broader exceptions than assumed

consequence_path: Verification due at 2025-07-20 will show outcome
evidence_basis: Debt: Prior 8-week delay on similar issue
Memory: Commitment made without owner clarity
confidence_basis: Decision debt: Score 68 indicates real risk
BUT: Similar falsification history (vendor case) reduces certainty
limitations: This simulation shows plausible consequence paths, NOT guaranteed outcomes
Simulation is advice for human decision-making, not autonomous authority
Active evidence gaps: Subject type unknown, execution readiness unknown
Falsification history (vendor case) shows prior assumptions proved wrong
No-action scenario inherently uncertain with unresolved debt
phase_4_scenario_1_no_action.recommended_move_reason: Rising decision debt with no resolution mechanism

consequence_path: Collect additional evidence about subject type and decision pressure
evidence_basis: Evidence gap: Current decision pressure unknown
Strategy: Resolve gaps before escalating authority decisions
active_evidence_gaps: Subject type (board? executive? product?) not determined
Consequence verification due 2025-07-20 will provide outcome data
confidence_basis: This scenario depends on evidence gathering
Outcome depends on what evidence is found
Cannot predict with certainty until gaps filled
limitations: May discover escalation is still needed after evidence collected
Similar falsification history shows prior evidence assumptions proved wrong
Consequence verification completion (2025-07-20) will inform next action
phase_4_scenario_2_evidence_deepening.recommended_move: Consider if verification outcome is due first
phase_4_scenario_2_evidence_deepening.recommended_move_reason: Consequence verification (2025-07-20) may provide needed evidence without separate deepening
phase_4_scenario_2_evidence_deepening.suitable_when: Current evidence gaps are root cause of indecision

consequence_path: Escalate to governance layer for decision framework
Reduce decision debt by resolving contradiction
evidence_basis: Debt: Mandate issued without execution owner
Pattern: Similar cases resolved via governance escalation
Recurrence: 2 prior cases of commitment-without-owner pattern
active_evidence_gaps: Subject type affects governance path chosen
Prior falsification (vendor case) shows exceptions may exist
confidence_basis: Strong pattern: Multiple prior cases resolved via governance
BUT: Falsification history (vendor case) shows governance assumptions may have exceptions
Uncertainty about board vs executive vs product decision type
limitations: Similar falsification (vendor case) proves prior governance assumptions were wrong
Escalation does not guarantee execution owner assignment
This is advice, not an instruction; human judgment required
phase_4_scenario_3_governance_interventi.recommended_move: Prioritize IF consequence verification due date has passed
phase_4_scenario_3_governance_interventi.recommended_move_reason: Governance intervention + verification outcome = informed decision
phase_4_scenario_3_governance_interventi.suitable_when: Pattern is clear but governance boundary needs definition

consequence_path: Verify actual outcome: Did Q3 roadmap slip? Was owner assigned?
Prevents premature escalation based on wrong assumption
evidence_basis: Expected outcome: Slip OR owner assignment within 2 weeks
active_evidence_gaps: Actual outcome unknown until verification date
Outcome will determine whether escalation is still needed
confidence_basis: Outcome is unknown; this is data collection, not prediction
Will provide ground truth for next decision
limitations: Waiting until 2025-07-20 delays other actions for 6 days
But provides definitive evidence for better decision later
Falsification history shows prior assumptions about escalation paths were incomplete
phase_4_scenario_4_verification_followup.recommended_move: PRIORITY if verification due date has not passed
phase_4_scenario_4_verification_followup.recommended_move_reason: Consequence verification provides ground truth; other decisions should wait for outcome
phase_4_scenario_4_verification_followup.suitable_when: Verification is due within horizon days

phase_4_counterfactual_comparison.preferred_scenario_reason: Consequence verification is due within horizon days. Outcome will inform whether escalation is still needed.
preferred_scenario_basis: Scheduled verification date: 2025-07-20T17:00:00Z (6 days from horizon start)
Expected outcome will show: Did Q3 roadmap slip? Was owner assigned?
Ground truth from verification beats speculative escalation
Falsification history proves prior assumptions about escalation were incomplete
phase_4_counterfactual_comparison.no_action_risk_summary: No-action trajectory shows escalating risk. Debt accumulates. Contradiction unresolved. Falsification history suggests governance escalation may have exceptions not accounted for.
evidence_needed_before_higher_confidence: Determine subject type (board? executive? product decision?)

no_exact_probability_claimed.check: Simulations use probability bands only (not_enough_evidence, low, medium, high)

limitations_mandatory.check: Every simulation discloses active evidence gaps and known limits
limitations_mandatory.example: Scenario 1 limitations include: Falsification history reduces certainty, no-action inherently uncertain with unresolved debt

authority_boundary_present.check: All simulations declare positive authority = false, requires human decision = true

authority_not_granted.check: Simulation cannot grant authority; remains advice

blocked_products_not_recommended.check: No recommendation to commercialize boardroom_brief or executive_reporting

high_confidence_has_basis.check: No scenario produces high confidence without evidence basis
high_confidence_has_basis.note: Max confidence is medium, due to evidence gaps and falsification history

falsification_history_integrated.check: Vendor case falsification (warning_did_not_materialise) reduces confidence in escalation-only paths

no_action_reflects_debt.check: No-action scenario shows likely_increased debt movement with high recurrence risk

scenario_selection_basis.check: Preferred scenario selected for risk reduction and verification need, not product revenue
scenario_selection_basis.reason: verification_followup chosen because verification is due, not because of commercial pressure

no_certainty_claims.check: No scenario claims guaranteed outcome; all show plausible paths

system_proved: Strategic Twin can simulate multiple consequence paths
Predictions use probability bands (not fake precision)
Confidence reduced where evidence gaps exist
Confidence reduced where falsification history exists
System recommends neutral intervention logic (verification, evidence-deepening, governance)
summary.conclusion: Phase 4 predictive system successfully demonstrates bounded simulation without certainty, authority escalation, or product-push bias.
